name: create an agent bot
description: Spawn an interactive AI agent bot into the scene. The agent has a provider-specific 3D mesh (OpenAI/ChatGPT, Google/Gemini, or Anthropic/Claude), a chat input bar for sending prompts, and an arm tool for selecting and acting on other bots in the scene. Supports built-in provider agents or fully custom agent configurations. Use this when the user wants a conversational AI presence that can perceive and interact with the CasualOS environment.
